mermaidSyntax:
gantt
  title 24-Month Multi-Site Clinical Study Timeline
  dateFormat YYYY-MM
  axisFormat %b

  section Phase 1 - Preparation
    IRB Approval                    :irb, 2024-01, 2M
    Site Selection & Training       :site, 2024-02, 2M
    Database Setup                  :db, 2024-03, 2M

  section Phase 2 - Enrollment
    Site 1 Enrollment (M4-M8)       :s1, 2024-04, 4M
    Site 2 Enrollment (M5-M10)      :s2, 2024-05, 5M
    Site 3 Enrollment (M6-M12)      :s3, 2024-06, 6M

  section Phase 3 - Treatment
    Treatment Period (M8-M16)       :treat, 2024-08, 8M
    3-Month Follow-up (M16-M20)     :follow, 2025-04, 4M

  section Phase 4 - Analysis
    Data Lock (M18)                 :lock, 2025-06, 1M
    Statistical Analysis (M18-M21)  :stats, 2025-06, 3M
    Manuscript Prep (M21-M23)       :ms, 2025-09, 3M

  section Milestones
    DSMB Review M8                  :milestone, 2024-08, 0d
    DSMB Review M12                 :milestone, 2024-12, 0d
    DSMB Review M16                 :milestone, 2025-04, 0d
    Final Submission M24            :milestone, 2025-12, 0d

failures.description: No branching pattern detected — no node has 2+ outgoing arrows
failures.suggestedFix: Ensure the AI generates branch points where the input describes parallel paths
